content_body: We had a great time. The cabin was well equipped and clean when we arrived. The scenery was absolutely breathtaking. We stayed for 4 days. Day one we went tubing from the backyard down to McCaysville. The second day we went white water rafting with OAR. If you go ask for Anthony as he was the best guide. We did a lot more Rapids and fun stuff than the other guides. Day three we hiked up to a few waterfalls and went into town to look at the shops. We went to Fall Branch Falls and Three Forks waterfall. Both were short walks and easy hikes. http://www.blueridgemountains.com/waterfalls.html Day 4 we took a day trip to Chattanooga and went to Ruby Falls and Rock City. Now it's time to pack and head back to Florida. The family has tears in their eyes. We will miss Time Flies. We hope to come back next year. We have stayed in numerous cabins with various companies in the past, but I think we found the best for our family in Time Flies. We loved the place.
title: We Found the Best of Our Family in Time Flies
